bird.name: White-throated cacholote
bird.summary: The white-throated cacholote (Pseudoseisura gutturalis) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariida…

relations.subject: White-throated cacholote
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in central Argentina. The geographic dividing line or overlap area between them is unclear. The species inhabits generally barren landscapes such as arid scrublands in lowlands and montane valleys; in the north it also occurs in woodlands dominated by Prosopis
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: White-throated cacholote
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon to fairly common and "[e]vidently tolerant of fairly extensive anthropogenic habitat disturbance"
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
